channel.title: Paper on VBOX
channel.description: Recent content in Paper on VBOX

item.title: Calibration of the discrete element method and modelling of shortening experiments (Data)
item.description: LI Changsheng, YIN Hongwei*, et al. (2021) Calibration of the discrete element method and modelling of shortening experiments. Front. Earth Sci. doi: 10.3389/feart.2021.636512 Original Research: The discrete element method (DEM) is becoming widely accepted as an effective method of addressing tectonic problems in granular materials. It is capable of reproducing structures observed in the analogue model (AM). However, the previous experiments … Accepted on 05 May 2021 演化过

item.title: Validation Tests for Discrete Element Codes Using Single-Contact Systems
item.description: Download：MATLAB codes Solve_T1_T2_T3_T4.m Fs.m PFC codes Fn_T1_T2final.txt Fs_T3_T4final.txt The stability of a single contact system in discrete element model was tested from the analytical solution, see Full Paper。
